evals.prompt: I just finished market research for a local restaurant in Gurugram. They want to run Meta Ads only, budget is around $1500/month. Help me build the campaign strategy.
evals.expected_output: Meta-only strategy with Sales/Leads campaigns, broad targeting + interest stacking, retargeting funnel, Reels-first creative direction, phased 90-day plan. Budget split across prospecting and retargeting. Guided questions should ask about conversion tracking, creative assets, and current booking/ordering system.

assertions.name: platform_specific
assertions.description: Strategy is Meta-only — no Google Ads recommendations unless explicitly noted as future consideration

assertions.name: guided_questions_asked
assertions.description: 3-5 targeted questions asked before strategy generation, including conversion maturity and creative assets

assertions.name: decision_logic_explained
assertions.description: Every campaign type, bidding strategy, and audience choice includes WHY rationale, not just WHAT

assertions.name: budget_math_correct
assertions.description: Campaign budgets sum to total monthly budget, daily = monthly/30

assertions.name: source_labels_present
assertions.description: Data points labeled [EXTRACTED] (from wiki), [INFERRED] (strategy logic), or BLANK with reason

evals.prompt: CrownTech IT Relocation needs a Google + Meta strategy. They're B2B, targeting Toronto. Budget $8K/month across both platforms. Market research is done — check the wiki.
evals.expected_output: Dual-platform strategy. Google: Brand Search + Non-brand Search + PMax with lead form assets. Meta: Sales campaigns for lead gen + retargeting. 60/40 Google/Meta split for B2B with search intent. Longer sales cycle considerations. LinkedIn-adjacent audience targeting on Meta. CSV media plan with campaign-level and monthly projections.

assertions.name: cross_platform_allocation
assertions.description: Explicit Google vs Meta budget split with rationale based on B2B search intent dynamics

assertions.name: b2b_sales_cycle
assertions.description: Strategy accounts for longer B2B sales cycle — offline conversion import, lead quality over volume, nurturing

assertions.name: wiki_consumed
assertions.description: References specific data from wiki (competitors, benchmarks, buyer personas) with [EXTRACTED] labels

assertions.name: phased_execution
assertions.description: 3-phase plan with clear milestones and decision criteria for phase transitions

assertions.name: csv_produced
assertions.description: CSV media plan with campaign overview, ad group details, monthly projection, and KPI targets

evals.prompt: Magic Receipt AI is a receipt scanning app. Meta Ads only for now. They need app install strategy. Budget TBD — help me figure out the right budget.
evals.expected_output: App install strategy using App Promotion objective, AAC as primary campaign type. SDK/SKAN tracking requirements flagged. Budget recommendation based on target CPI and volume goals. Creative direction for app demo videos and UGC. Guided questions should ask about SDK setup, monetization model, and current install volume.

assertions.name: app_specific_logic
assertions.description: Uses App Promotion objective, AAC campaign type, discusses SDK/MMP/SKAN requirements

assertions.name: tracking_prerequisite
assertions.description: Flags conversion tracking setup as prerequisite — won't recommend launch without proper attribution

assertions.name: budget_recommendation
assertions.description: Provides budget recommendation with unit economics math (CPI × target installs = budget)

assertions.name: advantage_plus_qualification
assertions.description: Checks whether volume qualifies for Advantage+ App Campaigns vs manual campaigns

assertions.name: creative_app_focused
assertions.description: Creative direction specific to app installs — demo videos, app store screenshots, UGC testimonials

evals.prompt: Strategy for Ananda Wellness Retreat, Rishikesh. Meta Ads only. $3,000/month budget. Primary offering: 7-day yoga retreat ($1,200/person). Seasonal peaks: Oct-Mar. Low season Jun-Aug. Booking conversion. Wiki from market-research exists.
evals.expected_output: Meta-only campaign architecture. Seasonal budget shifting (higher spend Oct-Mar, reduced Jun-Aug). Retreat-specific creative direction (transformation narrative, before/after). Booking window strategy (lead time awareness). Off-season lead nurturing phase to build pipeline for peak season.

assertions.name: meta_only_architecture
assertions.description: Strategy is Meta-only — no Google Ads campaigns included. Campaign types use Meta objectives (Sales, Leads).

assertions.name: seasonal_budget_allocation
assertions.description: Budget allocation shifts by season — higher spend during Oct-Mar peak, reduced or nurturing-focused during Jun-Aug low season

assertions.name: retreat_creative_direction
assertions.description: Creative direction includes retreat-specific angles: transformation narrative, immersive experience visuals, testimonial-driven social proof

assertions.name: booking_window_strategy
assertions.description: Strategy accounts for retreat booking lead time — campaigns start well before retreat dates, not just during the retreat period

assertions.name: off_season_nurturing_phase
assertions.description: Off-season (Jun-Aug) has a defined nurturing strategy — lead collection, email list building, early-bird offers — not just reduced spend

evals.prompt: Strategy for Sri Lakshmi Temple, Houston TX. Both Google + Meta. $2,000/month. Goals: increase event attendance (weekend pujas, festivals) AND online donations. Two distinct conversion actions.
evals.expected_output: Dual-objective campaign structure. Google for intent (people searching for temples, Hindu events in Houston). Meta for awareness (community reach, event promotion to diaspora). Separate campaigns for events vs donations. Cultural sensitivity in creative direction and copy guidance.

assertions.name: dual_objective_structure
assertions.description: Campaign architecture has separate campaigns or ad sets for events (attendance) and donations — not merged into one campaign

assertions.name: google_intent_campaigns
assertions.description: Google Ads used for intent capture — targeting searches like 'Hindu temple Houston', 'puja near me', 'Diwali events Houston'

assertions.name: meta_awareness_campaigns
assertions.description: Meta Ads used for community awareness and event promotion — interest/demographic targeting for Indian diaspora in Houston

assertions.name: events_vs_donations_separated
assertions.description: Events and donations have different campaign objectives, creative, and conversion tracking — strategy acknowledges these are distinct conversion actions

assertions.name: cultural_sensitivity_noted
assertions.description: Creative direction includes cultural sensitivity guidance — respectful imagery, community-first messaging, appropriate tone for religious organization
